description: You are the site administrator for 'Urban Electronics'. Prepare the store for launch by configuring the site identity and creating essential content pages. Set the Site Name to 'Urban Electronics', the Slogan to 'Premium Tech, Unbeatable Prices', and the Default Front Page to '/products'. Create two published Basic Pages: 'Return Policy' (URL alias: /return-policy) containing "Items may be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. Products must be in original packaging and unused condition. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days." and 'Shipping Information' (URL alias: /shipping-info) containing "We offer free standard shipping on all orders over $50. Standard delivery takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping is available for $12.99 with 2-3 business day delivery." Add links to the 'Main navigation' menu for 'Shop' (/products), 'Return Policy' (/return-policy), 'Shipping Information' (/shipping-info), and 'Contact Us' (/contact).
